title: Phase 31CC -- Qwen2.5-1.5B Real-Activation Capture Planning
scope: PLANNING-ONLY phase. No activation capture runs. No generation. No inference beyond metadata inspection. No sampling. No llama.cpp modification. No hook creation. No Q2_K/SDIR artifact generation. No model inference beyond metadata inspection. No model file download. No quality/performance/runtime/behavior claim. No commit/push/tag without explicit Matt approval.
forbidden_actions_upheld: no activation capture execution in this phase
no model forward pass beyond metadata inspection (no tokenized prompt -> model -> output) in this phase
no generation / inference / sampling / autoregressive decoding
no forward hook creation (anywhere: HuggingFace transformers, llama.cpp, or other framework)
no runtime integration with any inference engine
no model file download (no HF safetensors, no GGUF, no anything)
no quality / performance / runtime / behavior / production claim
no commit / push / tag without explicit Matt approval
no modification of prior accepted numeric results (0.5B 31BN/31BM, 1.5B 31BZ/31CA)
no modification of the corrected_q2k_policy_v1 package

no W_ref source pivot: the W_ref for replay stays as the local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized, matching 31BU/31BV/31BX/31BZ exactly. The earlier 31CC draft's W_ref-source-pivot idea is RETRACTED; Option A is an HF-derived real-activation proxy, not a W_ref pivot.

real_activation_definition.capture_point: pre-FFN residual stream input to the FFN block of layer L (i.e. the tensor flowing into blk.L.ffn_up and blk.L.ffn_gate, equivalent to the output of blk.L.attn_norm + post-attention residual-add in Qwen2.5 architecture)
real_activation_definition.capture_mechanism: actual hidden-state vector X from a real model forward pass on tokenized prompt text
real_activation_definition.policy_unchanged: corrected_q2k_policy_v1 (corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K, ffn_up+ffn_gate SDIR k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, no ffn_down residual)
real_activation_definition.w_ref_for_replay: local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized, matching 31BU/31BV/31BX/31BZ exactly. UNCHANGED in both Option A and Option B.
real_activation_definition.w_low_for_replay: corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K derived from the Q4_K_M GGUF W_ref (the actual deployed W_low). UNCHANGED.
real_activation_definition.sdir_for_replay: ffn_up+ffn_gate SDIR k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, no ffn_down residual. UNCHANGED.
real_activation_definition.x_source_option_a: HuggingFace transformers forward-hook on Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct safetensors (BF16/FP16). HF-derived real-activation PROXY, NOT exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation.
real_activation_definition.x_source_option_b: llama.cpp instrumentation hook on local Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct Q4_K_M GGUF. EXACT Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation.
real_activation_definition.exclusions: no sampling, no generation, no attention-pattern capture, no K/V cache capture, no post-FFN residual capture, no multi-step autoregressive state, no per-token multi-step rollout

prior_evidence_reviewed.sot_section_3_31BZ: 1.5B full-layer two-seed aggregate PASSED (56/56 pairs); mean delta_cos=+0.004758; 4-runner reproducibility confirmed; W_ref = Q4_K_M dequantized

capture_strategies_considered.name: HuggingFace transformers forward-hook capture (HF-derived real-activation proxy)
capture_strategies_considered.mechanism: load Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct safetensors (BF16/FP16) via transformers.AutoModelForCausalLM; register forward_hook on each selected FFN block to capture pre-FFN residual stream input; run prefill-only forward pass on a tokenized prompt; save X
capture_strategies_considered.provenance: exact mechanism used by Phase 31I for Qwen2.5-0.5B (proven on this host; 12 hooks registered; 15 prompts processed)
capture_strategies_considered.labeling: HF-derived real-activation PROXY; NOT exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation. The X is captured from the HF safetensors model binary (a different binary from the local Q4_K_M GGUF), so it does not represent the Q4_K_M GGUF's forward pass.
capture_strategies_considered.w_ref_for_replay: local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized (UNCHANGED from 31BU/31BV/31BX/31BZ). NO W_ref source pivot in Option A. The earlier 31CC draft's W_ref-source-pivot idea is RETRACTED.
capture_strategies_considered.w_low_for_replay: corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K from Q4_K_M GGUF W_ref (UNCHANGED)
capture_strategies_considered.sdir_for_replay: ffn_up+ffn_gate SDIR k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, no ffn_down residual (UNCHANGED)
pros: proven methodology on this host (31I succeeded for 0.5B)
self-contained Python; no llama.cpp modification; no GGUF instrumentation
standard well-supported Python forward path; 1.5B safetensors publicly available and small (~3 GB BF16)
W_ref source UNCHANGED from frozen 1.5B convention; Option A does NOT introduce a W_ref source pivot
output is a single numpy array per (layer, prompt, token-position); easy to inspect, hash, summarize
compatible with existing 31BX/31BZ harness via a one-line change in X generation

31CD cos_low is on the same W_ref baseline as 31BU/31BV/31BX/31BZ cos_low and the two can be compared numerically WITH the sign-pattern caveat (see allowed/forbidden claims in 31CC); this is a methodological property, not a behavioral-equivalence claim
cons: requires a new model download; HF safetensors are NOT local; 31BS download protocol requires explicit Matt approval
the X is captured from the HF safetensors, not the Q4_K_M GGUF; Option A cannot claim exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation behavior
adds new dependency surface (transformers + safetensors + the 1.5B safetensors file)
may need to verify transformers + torch are installed in the active venv (31BS log mentions huggingface-hub==1.17.0 but not transformers or torch)
capture_strategies_considered.cost_estimate: download ~3 GB (~5-15 min); model load ~20-40 sec; hook+prefill ~2-5 sec per prompt; total for 31CD's small scope (1 prompt x 3 layers x 1 position) well under 5 min wall clock
capture_strategies_considered.approval_dependencies: 31CD Option A is CONDITIONAL on (a) Matt's explicit choice of Option A at 31CD entry, AND (b) explicit Matt approval of the HF safetensors download (per 31BS approval phrase template)
capture_strategies_considered.w_ref_pivot_documented: NO pivot in the default 31CD plan. The earlier 31CC draft's pivot idea is retracted.

capture_strategies_considered.name: llama.cpp instrumentation capture (the only path that can claim exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation capture)
capture_strategies_considered.mechanism: add a minimal diagnostic hook inside llama.cpp to dump the FFN input activation (pre-ffn_up/ffn_gate) for a specified layer and token position to a file or stdout; invoke llama.cpp on a tokenized prompt; replay the captured X through the existing 31BX/31BZ harness using the Q4_K_M GGUF W_ref
capture_strategies_considered.provenance: no existing precedent in this repo for llama.cpp Python integration beyond libggml-base.so ctypes calls for quantize_row_q2_K_ref / dequantize_row_q2_K (Q2_K encode/decode); Option B is exploratory
capture_strategies_considered.labeling: EXACT Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation capture. Only path that can make this claim. The X is captured from the same model binary that produced the deployed artifacts, via the actual llama.cpp forward path.
capture_strategies_considered.w_ref_for_replay: local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized (UNCHANGED from 31BU/31BV/31BX/31BZ). Identical to Option A's W_ref.
capture_strategies_considered.w_low_for_replay: corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K from Q4_K_M GGUF W_ref (UNCHANGED)
capture_strategies_considered.sdir_for_replay: ffn_up+ffn_gate SDIR k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, no ffn_down residual (UNCHANGED)
pros: uses the existing local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF; no new download required
preserves the existing W_ref source convention (Q4_K_M dequantized, NOT FP16)
closest to the actual llama.cpp inference path; X is produced by the actual runtime
ONLY path that can claim exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation capture
avoids any 'proxy' framing -- the X is exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation
cons: no existing precedent in this repo for llama.cpp Python integration
invasive: requires modifying llama.cpp source, compiling, testing
compile risk: rebuilding llama.cpp with a custom hook takes minutes-to-hours; can break on upstream API changes; 31CC cannot predict the cost
runtime complexity: dump format, hook placement, token-position selection all need implementation and testing
llama.cpp modification rule: 31CC does NOT modify llama.cpp; even if Option B is selected, the actual modification happens in 31CD
forbids 'llama.cpp integration' claim: any successful Option B capture cannot be framed as integration; it is a diagnostic hook only
capture_strategies_considered.cost_estimate: llama.cpp build ~5-30 min (one-time); hook + dump wiring ~30-60 min coding; capture run ~seconds; total for 31CD ~1-2 hours of engineering (mostly in 31CD, not 31CC)
capture_strategies_considered.approval_dependencies: no new download; REQUIRES (a) Matt's explicit choice of Option B at 31CD entry, AND (b) explicit operator permission to modify and rebuild ~/llama.cpp on this host (the directory is operator-owned); both approvals required at 31CD entry, not at 31CC
capture_strategies_considered.preferred_when: the goal is exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation capture. Operator may also choose this even if the goal is just a real-activation micro-probe, since it is the more faithful path.

capture_strategies_considered.name: Stop and re-plan via 31CC-R
capture_strategies_considered.mechanism: Matt chooses neither A nor B at 31CD entry; 31CD classifies as BLOCKED_31CD_CAPTURE_PATH_UNAVAILABLE; next permissible phase becomes 31CC-R (re-plan)
pros: preserves the option to re-plan with a different approach
no forced commitment to either Option A or Option B
cons: delays the largest open scientific question: do real prompt-derived activations show the same corrected-Q2_K sign pattern (memory-positive, finite, delta_cos non-negative or positive, MAE non-worsening or improving) as the prior synthetic-Gaussian tensor-harness results, on the selected 31CD prompt/layer/token scope?
requires a future 31CC-R phase to revisit the design
capture_strategies_considered.verdict: valid choice at 31CD entry; explicit 'stop and re-plan' branch in the 31CD-entry decision point

capture_strategies_considered.name: Minimal local forward-proxy
capture_strategies_considered.mechanism: reconstruct one layer's upstream (embedding + attention + residual-add) using small-numpy primitives; replay captured X through the FFN block
cons: almost certainly incorrect: reproducing even one layer's upstream (RMSNorm + 12-head attention + residual + RMSNorm) faithfully without the real model is highly error-prone
the 'real activation' it produces is NOT real
high risk of becoming an accidental runtime implementation; crosses into territory 31CC is forbidden to enter
cannot be validated without running the real model for comparison, which defeats the purpose
no value beyond a deterministic synthetic input; the project already uses np.random.default_rng for that
capture_strategies_considered.rejection_reason: no methodological value; high implementation risk; out of scope for 31CC

capture_strategies_considered.name: Stop and plan runtime / loader format first
capture_strategies_considered.mechanism: skip real-activation capture for now; design the runtime artifact format and loader for the static Q2_K + SDIR path
pros: removes a prerequisite for llama.cpp integration (separate lane)
cons: delays the largest open scientific question: do real prompt-derived activations show the same corrected-Q2_K sign pattern (memory-positive, finite, delta_cos non-negative or positive, MAE non-worsening or improving) as the prior synthetic-Gaussian tensor-harness results, on the selected 31CD prompt/layer/token scope?
31BE roadmap already deferred runtime-integration to a later lane; 31BF (artifact format hardening) is also a separate lane
31CC is the recommended lane per 31CB's reasoning; selecting Option E would mean deferring 31CC's purpose entirely
capture_strategies_considered.scope_note: Option E is a legitimate alternative already permitted in SOT Section 9 (31CC Runtime Artifact Format / Loader Planning); not selected as 31CC's primary recommendation because 31CB reasoning identified real-activation capture as the largest remaining scientific gap

selected_next_executable_phase.title: Phase 31CD -- Qwen2.5-1.5B Real-Activation Capture Micro-Probe
selected_next_executable_phase.default_mechanism: Option A (HF-derived real-activation proxy) AND Option B (llama.cpp/GGUF exact runtime activation capture) are both valid; Matt must explicitly choose at 31CD entry. Neither is auto-selected.
selected_next_executable_phase.scope_summary: small micro-probe on a single short prompt (default 'The capital of France is', 6 BPE tokens), 3 layers (0, 14, 27) OR 1 layer (0) for the first iteration, 1 token position (last prefill token), batch=1, shape [1, 1536] (1.5B hidden); replay through W_ref MLP / Q2_K-only MLP / Q2_K+SDIR MLP per corrected_q2k_policy_v1; metrics: cos_low, cos_sub, delta_cos, MAE_low, MAE_sub, MAE_delta, finite, severe, memory margin
selected_next_executable_phase.w_ref_for_replay: local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized (UNCHANGED from 31BU/31BV/31BX/31BZ, identical for Option A and Option B). The earlier 31CC draft's W_ref source pivot idea is RETRACTED.
selected_next_executable_phase.w_low_for_replay: corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K from Q4_K_M GGUF W_ref (UNCHANGED)
selected_next_executable_phase.sdir_for_replay: ffn_up+ffn_gate SDIR k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, no ffn_down residual (UNCHANGED)
selected_next_executable_phase.x_source_option_a: HuggingFace transformers forward-hook on Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct safetensors (BF16/FP16). HF-derived real-activation PROXY. NO exact-Q4_K_M-GGUF-runtime-activation claim.
selected_next_executable_phase.x_source_option_b: llama.cpp instrumentation hook on local Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct Q4_K_M GGUF. EXACT Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation. The only path that can make this claim.
selected_next_executable_phase.activation_artifact_policy: raw activation arrays written to tempfile.mkdtemp, NOT committed by default; result JSON contains only summary metrics + SHA256 of raw X (for reproducibility reference) + metadata; commit-exception requires explicit Matt approval at 31CD entry (hard cap 1 MB, must be under data/phase31cd_*.npz)
selected_next_executable_phase.prompt_redaction_policy: prompts > 64 chars redacted in result JSON to '<sha256[:16]>...<len>(redacted)'; prompts <= 64 chars stored verbatim
selected_next_executable_phase.prompt_pii_policy: no PII allowed in default 31CD prompt set; prompts must be short, operator-authored, or public-domain
selected_next_executable_phase.privacy_policy: all captured X treated as generated artifact; not committed; PII-free by default
selected_next_executable_phase.entry_decision_default: no default; Matt must explicitly choose at 31CD entry. Default 31CD plan documents both A and B; the choice is Matt's.
selected_next_executable_phase.entry_dependencies: (A) Matt's explicit choice of Option A AND explicit approval of HF safetensors download; OR (B) Matt's explicit choice of Option B AND explicit permission to modify and rebuild ~/llama.cpp; OR (C) stop and re-plan via 31CC-R. 31CD classifies as BLOCKED_31CD_NO_OPTION_SELECTED_AT_ENTRY until Matt chooses; once chosen, additional BLOCKED_* classifications may apply if the chosen option's specific prerequisites are not met.

decision_point_31cd_entry.hard_gate: 31CD must not begin until Matt explicitly chooses one of A, B, or C at 31CD entry.
decision_point_31cd_entry.option_A: HF-derived real-activation proxy. X captured via HF transformers forward-hook. W_ref for replay stays as Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized (unchanged from 31BU/31BV/31BX/31BZ). Requires HF safetensors download approval. Result is labeled 'HF-derived real-activation proxy'; cannot claim exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation. Cannot claim real llama.cpp runtime integration. Cannot claim generation/inference quality.
decision_point_31cd_entry.option_B: llama.cpp/GGUF activation capture instrumentation. X captured via minimal llama.cpp diagnostic hook. W_ref for replay stays as Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized (unchanged). Requires llama.cpp modification and rebuild approval. Result is the only path that can claim 'exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation capture'. Preferred if the goal is exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation. Still cannot claim real llama.cpp runtime integration (the hook is diagnostic, not an integration). Cannot claim generation/inference quality.
decision_point_31cd_entry.option_C: Stop and re-plan. 31CD classifies as BLOCKED_31CD_CAPTURE_PATH_UNAVAILABLE. Next permissible phase is 31CC-R (re-plan).

prompt_set_planning.default_prompt_source: 31I prompt index 1 (proven on 0.5B; 31CC recommends reusing for 1.5B 31CD first iteration)

stop_conditions_31cd: regression fails: PASS_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_RUNTIME_CLEAN is the required state; pre-flight or post-edit failure BLOCKS 31CD
no option chosen at 31CD entry (A / B / C); 31CD is in the BLOCKED_31CD_NO_OPTION_SELECTED_AT_ENTRY state
model file missing (HF safetensors for Option A; local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF for Option B)
capture path unavailable (HuggingFace transformers not importable for Option A; llama.cpp hook not built for Option B)
activation capture requires an unapproved dependency (e.g. torch not in active venv and not approved for install)
activation capture requires invasive runtime patch beyond approved scope (Option B: hook touches llama.cpp source; scope of touch must be approved at 31CD entry)
captured X has shape != [1, 1536] (or != [tokens, 1536] if multi-position is approved at 31CD entry)
captured X contains NaN or Inf
replay formula mismatch: Y_ref / Y_low / Y_sub shapes inconsistent with the 31BT canonical MLP formula output shape
Q2_K encode backend fails (q2k_is_available() returns false; libggml-base.so cannot be loaded)
SDIR encode/decode fails or returns malformed bytes
any raw activation artifact exceeds 1 MB (the hard cap for committed fixtures; uncommitted raw arrays are not capped)
any model file, HF cache, or raw activation blob would be committed accidentally (operator's responsibility to verify; runner must use model_path_observed_redacted field name)
any inference/generation/quality/behavior/speed/runtime claim would be added to the 31CD result
(Option A only) any claim of exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation behavior would be added to the result
(both options) any claim of real llama.cpp runtime integration would be added to the result

classifications_31cd.definition: capture succeeds, replay succeeds, all metrics finite, memory-positive (under corrected Q2_K + SDIR path), delta_cos >= 0 on all pairs, MAE_sub < MAE_low on all pairs, 0 severe regressions; no forbidden artifacts/claims; headline: corrected Q2_K + SDIR path is non-degrading on the captured real-activation micro-probe

capture and replay succeed; memory-positive on all pairs; all finite; 1+ pair has delta_cos < 0 (non-severe) or MAE_sub >= MAE_low (non-severe); headline: real-activation micro-probe is broadly consistent with the random-Gaussian micro-probe (31BU/31BV) at the same layers, with minor non-severe deviations

activation capture succeeds for all planned (layer, prompt, token-position) tuples, but replay is not completed (Q2_K backend fail, SDIR fail, regression fail, etc.); headline: real-activation capture methodology is viable on 1.5B; the replay step is blocked
capture succeeds; replay produces output not consistent with 31BT canonical MLP formula shape (unexpected Y_ref/Y_low/Y_sub shapes; cos_low degenerate)

Matt has not yet chosen between Option A, Option B, or Option C at 31CD entry. 31CD is in the waiting-for-decision state. Distinct from BLOCKED_31CD_CAPTURE_PATH_UNAVAILABLE which is the post-decision state if both A and B are declined.
Matt has explicitly chosen Option C (or has declined both Option A and Option B). No safe capture path exists. Next permissible phase is 31CC-R (re-plan).
Option A is chosen but operator has not approved the HF safetensors download; 31CD may switch to Option B (fallback) only with operator's explicit switch at 31CD entry
Option B is chosen but operator has not approved the llama.cpp source modification; 31CD may switch to Option A (default) only with operator's explicit HF download approval at 31CD entry
SDI_MODEL_DIR env var is not set on the operator's host
model file (HF safetensors for Option A; GGUF for Option B) is not present at the expected path
q2k_is_available() returns false; libggml-base.so cannot be loaded
encode_sdir / decode_sdir raises or returns malformed bytes
transformers.from_pretrained() fails (Option A) or GGUFReader fails to load the model (Option B)
registered hook does not fire, fires on the wrong tensor, fires with NaN/Inf tensor, or fires with non-[*, 1536] tensor (Option A)
llama.cpp rebuild with the Option B hook fails to compile
SOT Section 9 does not list 31CD as the current allowed next phase (i.e. a future phase has been completed that supersedes 31CC, or a future allowed-phase change has been recorded)

allowed_claims_31cd: Corrected Q2_K + SDIR (per corrected_q2k_policy_v1) did not degrade MLP output similarity over Q2_K-only on a tiny real prompt-derived activation micro-probe on Qwen2.5-1.5B at the selected layer(s) and token position(s). (Allowed when delta_cos >= 0 on all pairs. Applies to both Option A and Option B.)

The corrected Q2_K policy remains memory-positive on the real-activation micro-probe (per-layer margin under Q4 budget is non-negative). (Allowed when memory-positive on all pairs. Applies to both Option A and Option B.)

Real-activation capture on Qwen2.5-1.5B is viable via [HuggingFace transformers forward hooks | llama.cpp instrumentation]. (Allowed when the corresponding capture path succeeded; methodology-only, not a runtime claim.)
Exact Q4_K_M GGUF runtime activation capture on Qwen2.5-1.5B is viable via llama.cpp instrumentation. (Allowed for Option B ONLY; not allowed for Option A because Option A is a proxy.)
forbidden_claims_31cd: no inference latency / throughput / wall-clock claim beyond informational wall-clock note (no per-token, no per-prompt, no end-to-end) (universal)
no broader activation-distribution claim (no claim that the micro-probe is representative of all real prompts, all token positions, all layers, all attention patterns) (universal)
no all-token / all-layer / all-prompt real-activation claim (universal)
no claim that real generation will work (universal)
no claim that the micro-probe result transfers to other prompts, layers, token positions, or models (universal)

Option D (local forward-proxy) rejected; Option E (runtime/loader format planning) recorded as out of scope. Hard 31CD-entry decision point defined: Matt must explicitly choose A, B, or C before 31CD can begin; BLOCKED_31CD_NO_OPTION_SELECTED_AT_ENTRY classification added. The earlier 31CC draft's W_ref source pivot idea for Option A is RETRACTED: in the revised 31CD plan, BOTH Option A and Option B use the same W_ref (local 1.5B Q4_K_M GGUF dequantized), the same W_low (corrected_ceil_per_row Q2_K from the Q4_K_M GGUF), and the same SDIR (ffn_up+ffn_gate SDIR k=0.5%, alpha=1.0, no ffn_down residual). The ONLY thing that differs across the two options is the X source: Option A captures X from the HF safetensors (a different model binary, so it is a proxy); Option B captures X from the local Q4_K_M GGUF via llama.cpp instrumentation (exact runtime activation). Exact 31CD scope defined: default prompt 'The capital of France is' (6 BPE tokens, PII-free, public-domain, sourced from 31I prompt index 1), default layers {0, 14, 27} (reducible to {0} for first iteration), default token position last prefill token, batch=1, shape [1, 1536]; metrics cos_low, cos_sub, delta_cos, MAE_low, MAE_sub, MAE_delta, finite, severe, memory margin; activation artifact policy (raw X in tempfile.mkdtemp, not committed by default; commit-exception requires explicit operator approval at 31CD entry; hard cap 1 MB); prompt redaction (>64 chars); 17 stop conditions; 17 classifications; 4 allowed claims (3 universal + 1 Option-B-only; the previously-listed 'real-activation replay reproduces synthetic-Gaussian micro-probe behavior' allowed claim is REMOVED in the latest revision to close a contradiction with the universal 'no real activations behave like synthetic Gaussian' forbidden claim); 20 forbidden claims (12 universal + 4 Option-A-only + 2 Option-B-only + 2 explicit-claim-language reinforcements: (1) Do not claim real activations behave like synthetic Gaussian. (2) Do not claim activation-distribution equivalence. (3) Do not claim transfer beyond the selected prompt/layer/token scope.); 3 entry-dependency approvals deferred to 31CD entry (Option A choice + HF safetensors download; OR Option B choice + llama.cpp modification; OR Option C choice). 31CC did not run activation capture, did not run generation, did not run inference beyond metadata inspection, did not modify llama.cpp, did not create hooks, did not download model files, did not generate Q2_K/SDIR artifacts, did not make quality/performance/runtime/behavior claims. 31CC did not change the 0.5B or 1.5B frozen evidence tiers; did not change the corrected_q2k_policy_v1 package; did not create a new tag; did not introduce any W_ref source pivot. The earlier 31CC draft's W_ref source pivot idea is RETRACTED; 31CD result text MAY use 'permitted description language' saying real-activation replay is directionally consistent with prior synthetic-Gaussian tensor-harness results only within the selected 31CD prompt/layer/token scope and only if the real-activation metrics show the same sign pattern (memory-positive, finite, delta_cos non-negative or positive, MAE non-worsening or improving) -- this is NOT a scientific claim, only descriptive language, and only with the sign-pattern caveat.
